title: Carpet_CuO_Addition
description: A simple carpet addition mod.It offers some features.
body:
A simple Carpet extension mod

Use the latest version whenever possible.

## Dependencies
| Name         | Type |
|------------|--------|
| carpet     | Required |
| fabric-api | Required |
